Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_001_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5406 0 0}I am ready to move out at any time. Awaiting orders.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_001_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5407 0 0}I am ready to move out at any time. Awaiting orders.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_001_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5408 0 0}I am ready to move out at any time. Awaiting orders.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_001_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5409 0 0}I am ready to move out at any time. Awaiting orders.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_001_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5410 0 0}I am ready to move out at any time. Awaiting orders.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_001_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5411 0 0}I am ready to move out at any time. Awaiting orders.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_001_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5412 0 0}I am ready to move out at any time. Awaiting orders.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_001_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5413 0 0}I am ready to move out at any time. Awaiting orders.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_001_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5516 0 0}I am ready to move out at any time. Awaiting orders.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_001_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5517 0 0}I am ready to move out at any time. Awaiting orders.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_02_001_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5000 0 0}Давайте зробимо все, що в наших силах![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_02_001_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5001 0 0}Давайте зробимо все, що в наших силах![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_002_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5217 0 0}Там є скриня зі скарбами. Що нам робити?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_002_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5218 0 0}Там є скриня зі скарбами. Що нам робити?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_002_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5414 0 0}Treasure chest identified. Will you open it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_002_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5415 0 0}Treasure chest identified. Will you open it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_002_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5416 0 0}Treasure chest identified. Will you open it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_002_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5417 0 0}Treasure chest identified. Will you open it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_02_002_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5008 0 0}Гей, хіба ця скриня не виглядає трохи інакше, ніж інші?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_02_002_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5009 0 0}Гей, хіба ця скриня не виглядає трохи інакше, ніж інші?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_002_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5156 0 0}...That chest looks like it's worth opening.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_002_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5157 0 0}...That chest looks like it's worth opening.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_002_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5546 0 0}Oh! That treasure chest looks pretty rare![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_002_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5547 0 0}Oh! That treasure chest looks pretty rare![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_002_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5304 0 0}That chest looks valuable! Let's open it up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_002_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5305 0 0}That chest looks valuable! Let's open it up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_002_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5666 0 0}That's one damn fancy chest for the takin'...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_002_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5667 0 0}That's one damn fancy chest for the takin'...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_02_003_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5010 0 0}Ми могли б повернутися, але... тобі вирішувати.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_03_003_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5079 0 0}Один телепортер подано! Він поверне нас до входу, але я готовий продовжувати.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_03_003_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5080 0 0}Один телепортер подано! Він поверне нас до входу, але я готовий продовжувати.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_003_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5158 0 0}That's a one-way teleporter... But there's no need to head back yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_003_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5221 0 0}Цей телепорт може перенести нас до входу. Спробуй згадати, де він знаходиться.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_003_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5422 0 0}A one-way teleporter is nearby. Will you return to the entrance?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_003_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5423 0 0}A one-way teleporter is nearby. Will you return to the entrance?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_003_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5548 0 0}That teleporter can take us back to the entrance, but I can keep going![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_003_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5306 0 0}Koro-chan found a one-way teleporter to the entrance![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_003_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5668 0 0}That'll take us to the entrance. You headin' back?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_02_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5011 0 0}Це приведе нас до входу. Повернемося назад...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5223 0 0}Такеба дуже виснажена. Мабуть, нам варто повернутися.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5307 0 0}Yukari-chan looks exhausted. Don't overdo it, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_03_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5081 0 0}Гей, це наш квиток назад. Що скажеш?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5224 0 0}Такеба дуже виснажена. Мабуть, нам варто повернутися.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5308 0 0}Yukari-chan looks exhausted. Don't overdo it, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_03_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5082 0 0}Гей, це наш квиток назад. Що скажеш?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5400 0 0}Yukari-chan looks exhausted. Don't overdo it, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5159 0 0}...That teleporter will take us to the entrance. What's your call, {f 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5225 0 0}Такеба дуже виснажена. Мабуть, нам варто повернутися.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5309 0 0}Yukari-chan looks exhausted. Don't overdo it, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5222 0 0}Такеба дуже виснажена. Мабуть, нам варто повернутися.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5310 0 0}Yukari-chan looks exhausted. Don't overdo it, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5424 0 0}One-way teleporter discovered... Shall we use it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5425 0 0}One-way teleporter discovered... Shall we use it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5311 0 0}Yukari-chan looks exhausted. Don't overdo it, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5549 0 0}Oh, a teleporter! Should we head back, {f 4 1}-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5313 0 0}Yukari-chan looks exhausted. Don't overdo it, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5314 0 0}Yukari-chan looks exhausted. Don't overdo it, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5669 0 0}We ain't stoppin' here...? Whatever, do what you want.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_003_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5312 0 0}Yukari-chan looks exhausted. Don't overdo it, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_03_005_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5087 0 0}Це одні з тих дверей. Що ти хочеш робити?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_03_005_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5088 0 0}Це одні з тих дверей. Що ти хочеш робити?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_03_005_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5089 0 0}Це одні з тих дверей. Що ти хочеш робити?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_005_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5430 0 0}Unidentified door spotted... How shall we proceed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_005_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5431 0 0}Unidentified door spotted... How shall we proceed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_005_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5432 0 0}Unidentified door spotted... How shall we proceed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_005_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5433 0 0}Unidentified door spotted... How shall we proceed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_005_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5552 0 0}...It's one of those doors. What should we do?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_005_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5553 0 0}...It's one of those doors. What should we do?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_005_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5518 0 0}Unidentified door spotted... How shall we proceed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_005_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5519 0 0}Unidentified door spotted... How shall we proceed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_005_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5672 0 0}It's one of those doors... Now what?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_005_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5673 0 0}It's one of those doors... Now what?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_011_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5183 0 0}...This'll be a fight worth our while.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_011_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5184 0 0}...This'll be a fight worth our while.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_011_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5573 0 0}Looks like that one will be tough to beat...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_011_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5574 0 0}Looks like that one will be tough to beat...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_011_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5185 0 0}Hey... Let's get the jump on that Shadow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_011_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5186 0 0}Hey... Let's get the jump on that Shadow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_011_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5259 0 0}Це рідкісна Тінь. Не дай їй втекти.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_011_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5260 0 0}Це рідкісна Тінь. Не дай їй втекти.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_011_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5575 0 0}Hey... That one's not like the others![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_011_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5576 0 0}Hey... That one's not like the others![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_011_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5694 0 0}Don't see one of those every day...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_011_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5695 0 0}Don't see one of those every day...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_02_014_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5056 0 0}Гей, там хтось є! Ми повинні допомогти![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_02_014_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5057 0 0}Гей, там хтось є! Ми повинні допомогти![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_03_014_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5140 0 0}Йоу, там хтось є! Ходімо, треба допомогти![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_03_014_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5141 0 0}Йоу, там хтось є! Ходімо, треба допомогти![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_014_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5204 0 0}Is that... a missing person!? Let's help![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_014_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5205 0 0}Is that... a missing person!? Let's help![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_014_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5290 0 0}Це... зникла людина!? Відвезімо їх у безпечне місце![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_014_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5291 0 0}Це... зникла людина!? Відвезімо їх у безпечне місце![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_014_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5387 0 0}Koro-chan's found a missing person! Let's go rescue them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_014_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5388 0 0}Koro-chan's found a missing person! Let's go rescue them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_03_015_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5142 0 0}Що за фігня!? Кіт!? Це не Тінь у формі кота... Точно?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_03_015_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5143 0 0}Що за фігня!? Кіт!? Це не Тінь у формі кота... Точно?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_015_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5206 0 0}We have an unexpected guest... Let's get 'em to safety.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_015_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5207 0 0}We have an unexpected guest... Let's get 'em to safety.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_015_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5506 0 0}Life signs detected. It appears to be a small animal... Specifically, a cat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_015_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5507 0 0}Life signs detected. It appears to be a small animal... Specifically, a cat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_015_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5508 0 0}Life signs detected. It appears to be a small animal... Specifically, a cat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_015_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5509 0 0}Life signs detected. It appears to be a small animal... Specifically, a cat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_015_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5711 0 0}Ain't that... a cat? Why the hell is it even here...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_015_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5712 0 0}Ain't that... a cat? Why the hell is it even here...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_016_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5297 0 0}Гаразд, ми перевірили все на цьому поверсі.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_016_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5298 0 0}Гаразд, ми перевірили все на цьому поверсі.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_016_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5299 0 0}Гаразд, ми перевірили все на цьому поверсі.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_016_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5391 0 0}I think we've seen everything on this floor by now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_016_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5392 0 0}I think we've seen everything on this floor by now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_016_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5393 0 0}I think we've seen everything on this floor by now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_03_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5144 0 0}...Ти це чуєш? Ходімо, наступний поверх чекає![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_03_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5145 0 0}...Ти це чуєш? Ходімо, наступний поверх чекає![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_03_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5146 0 0}...Ти це чуєш? Ходімо, наступний поверх чекає![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5296 0 0}В такому випадку, ми закінчили з цим поверхом... Дозволю тобі вирішити, що робити далі.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5294 0 0}В такому випадку, ми закінчили з цим поверхом... Дозволю тобі вирішити, що робити далі.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5295 0 0}В такому випадку, ми закінчили з цим поверхом... Дозволю тобі вирішити, що робити далі.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5512 0 0}We have finished exploring this floor. Mad respect, as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5510 0 0}We have finished exploring this floor. Mad respect, as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5511 0 0}We have finished exploring this floor. Mad respect, as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5513 0 0}We have finished exploring this floor. Mad respect, as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5514 0 0}We have finished exploring this floor. Mad respect, as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5515 0 0}We have finished exploring this floor. Mad respect, as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5596 0 0}Sounds like we've seen everything here. What do we do next, Leader?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5594 0 0}Sounds like we've seen everything here. What do we do next, Leader?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5595 0 0}Sounds like we've seen everything here. What do we do next, Leader?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5394 0 0}Heehee, Koro-chan worked real hard—didn't you, Koro-chan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5537 0 0}We have finished exploring this floor. Mad respect, as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5716 0 0}Good dog... You worked real hard tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5715 0 0}Good dog... You worked real hard tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5713 0 0}Good dog... You worked real hard tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_016_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5714 0 0}Good dog... You worked real hard tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_022_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5278 0 0}У Іорі проблеми зі здоров'ям. З вами там все гаразд?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_022_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5279 0 0}У Іорі проблеми зі здоров'ям. З вами там все гаразд?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_022_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5355 0 0}Sanada-senpai doesn't look so good... Heal him up if you can![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_022_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5356 0 0}Sanada-senpai doesn't look so good... Heal him up if you can![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_022_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5357 0 0}Kirijo-senpai... Are you going to be okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_022_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5358 0 0}Kirijo-senpai... Are you going to be okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_022_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5484 0 0}This is just a scratch... as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_022_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5486 0 0}This is just a scratch... as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_022_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5485 0 0}This is just a scratch... as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_022_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5487 0 0}This is just a scratch... as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_022_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5363 0 0}Amada-kun, are you okay? Try not to push yourself too hard![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_022_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5581 0 0}Okay, but... I'm fine, really! I can handle this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_022_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5364 0 0}Amada-kun, are you okay? Try not to push yourself too hard![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_022_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5582 0 0}Okay, but... I'm fine, really! I can handle this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_022_8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5365 0 0}Koro-chan looks like he's in bad shape![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_022_8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5366 0 0}Koro-chan looks like he's in bad shape![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_023_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5282 0 0}Ти втратив багато сил... З тобою все гаразд?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_023_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5283 0 0}Ти втратив багато сил... З тобою все гаразд?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_023_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5371 0 0}Junpei-kun, are you okay...? You don't look well...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_023_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5372 0 0}Junpei-kun, are you okay...? You don't look well...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_023_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5375 0 0}Kirijo-senpai looks really tired. Is everything okay...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_023_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5267 0 0}Я в порядку... Але мені б не завадила перерва.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_023_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5376 0 0}Kirijo-senpai looks really tired. Is everything okay...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_023_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5268 0 0}Я в порядку... Але мені б не завадила перерва.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_023_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5488 0 0}...I may have difficulties using my Persona.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_023_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5489 0 0}...I may have difficulties using my Persona.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_023_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5490 0 0}...I may have difficulties using my Persona.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_023_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5491 0 0}...I may have difficulties using my Persona.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_023_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5381 0 0}Hang in there, Amada-kun. Don't force yourself to keep going![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_023_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5583 0 0}I'm okay, but... I do feel a bit worn out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_023_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5382 0 0}Hang in there, Amada-kun. Don't force yourself to keep going![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_023_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5584 0 0}I'm okay, but... I do feel a bit worn out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_023_8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5383 0 0}Koro-chan, are you doing okay? Your stamina's low...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_023_8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5384 0 0}Koro-chan, are you doing okay? Your stamina's low...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_025_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5201 0 0}Went off without a hitch. Let's get going.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_025_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5202 0 0}Went off without a hitch. Let's get going.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_025_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5203 0 0}Went off without a hitch. Let's get going.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_025_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5386 0 0}Good job, Koro-chan! Now let's get back to exploring![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_024_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5269 0 0}Чудово. Якраз те, на що ми сподівалися.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_024_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5270 0 0}Чудово. Якраз те, на що ми сподівалися.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_024_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5385 0 0}Heehee! You looked really cool out there, Koro-chan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_030_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5176 0 0}Dammit, we can't fight now... It's too risky.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_04_030_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5177 0 0}Dammit, we can't fight now... It's too risky.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_030_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5456 0 0}A formidable foe has appeared. How do we proceed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_030_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5457 0 0}A formidable foe has appeared. How do we proceed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_030_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5458 0 0}A formidable foe has appeared. How do we proceed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_030_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5459 0 0}A formidable foe has appeared. How do we proceed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_030_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5566 0 0}That doesn't sound good... We better get out of here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_030_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5567 0 0}That doesn't sound good... We better get out of here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_02_030_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5030 0 0}Виглядає не дуже добре, але... можливо, у нас є шанс?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_02_030_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5031 0 0}Виглядає не дуже добре, але... можливо, у нас є шанс?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_03_030_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5105 0 0}У нннас є шанс? Ледве-ледве, але все буде добре![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_03_030_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5106 0 0}У нннас є шанс? Ледве-ледве, але все буде добре![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_030_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5248 0 0}Нам потрібно буде підготуватися, якщо ми вступимо в бій.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_05_030_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5249 0 0}Нам потрібно буде підготуватися, якщо ми вступимо в бій.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_030_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5460 0 0}An encounter will lead to a difficult battle. Let us stay on high alert.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_07_030_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5461 0 0}An encounter will lead to a difficult battle. Let us stay on high alert.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_030_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5568 0 0}...Wh-What's the plan? Do we even stand a chance...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_08_030_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5569 0 0}...Wh-What's the plan? Do we even stand a chance...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_030_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5688 0 0}If you're lookin' for a fight, then get ready.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_030_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5347 0 0}It's the Reaper! Everyone, you need to escape![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_06_030_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5348 0 0}It's the Reaper! Everyone, you need to escape![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_030_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5696 0 0}Get it together if you don't wanna die.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_GENERAL_10_030_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5697 0 0}Get it together if you don't wanna die.[n]{f 1 1}
